title: Fable 5 Replacement Just Dropped: Fusion (Fable Level AI)
summary: OpenRouter released Fusion, a system that sends prompts to multiple AI models, compares outputs, identifies blind spots, and synthesizes results into a single response. A budget Fusion configuration achieved results near Fable 5 level on deep research benchmarks at approximately half the cost.
writeup: The video covers Fusion, an OpenRouter system that routes a single prompt to multiple AI models, compares their outputs, flags blind spots, and synthesizes the results into one response. This matters as an applied take on ensemble methods and test-time compute, treating model routing and aggregation as a path to stronger answers than any single model. The concrete takeaway: a budget Fusion configuration reached results near Fable 5 level on deep research benchmarks at roughly half the cost.
